data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures that UI elements are sized and positioned for easy targeting.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making processes by limiting options and presenting well-organized information.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs follow patterns familiar to users from other websites, improving usability.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Chunks content into digestible sections to align with cognitive limitations.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to indicate their relationship and improve intuitiveness.
